name: aaronllee--dex-quote
description: Fetch optimal swap quotes from OKX DEX Aggregator API (v6). Use this skill when a user wants to: 1. Get the best price for swapping tokens on any supported EVM/Solana chain 2. Compare DEX routing paths and price impact for token swaps 3. Build applications or scripts that query real-time DEX aggregator pricing Core value: Generates correct, authenticated API calls with proper token decimals, amount formatting, HMAC-SHA256 signing, and comprehensive error handling.
